subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast implored the downpour of bounties! Though an answer was previously dispatched, yet again do I write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استسقی من وابل العطاء اگرچه از پیش جواب ارسال شد ولی باز نگاشته میشود
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
